name: LED Exit Mirror Sign – With Battery Backup
description: The ZION LED USA Exit Mirror Sign Light combines modern aesthetics with dependable functionality, making it one of the most versatile and visually appealing exit signs on the market. Designed for a wide range of environments, it provides clear, unmistakable direction during emergencies—ensuring safety when it matters most. Upgrade your emergency lighting with the  ZION LED USA Exit Mirror Sign Light—where functionality meets design. Easy to install, built to last, and engineered for safety.
short_desc: Key Features: Code Compliant: Meets UL 924, NEC, OSHA, and NFPA 101 Life Safety Code standards for top-tier safety assurance. Damp Location Rated: Suitable for damp environments, delivering consistent performance across various conditions. Flexible Mounting Options: Supports multiple installations—wall, ceiling (standard or sloped), and recessed—for maximum adaptability. Durable, Stylish Build: Constructed with a rugged aluminum housing and a high-grade acrylic face for a sleek, professional finish. Customizable Directional Arrows: Field-installable chevrons allow for left, right, or bi-directional configurations. High-Efficiency LED Illumination: Long-lasting, energy-saving LED lights offer bright, reliable visibility. Battery Backup Equipped: Includes test switch and charge indicator for dependable operation during power outages (battery backup models). Dual Voltage Ready: Compatible with 120V and 277V electrical systems for flexible integration. Non-CEC Compliant: Please note, this model is not compliant with California Energy Commission (CEC) standards. Ideal Applications: Commercial Spaces: Perfect for offices, retail outlets, and other business environments. Educational Institutions: Enhances safety in schools, universities, and training centers. Healthcare Facilities: Provides critical emergency lighting in hospitals, clinics, and assisted living centers. Public Buildings: Excellent for libraries, government offices, and civic facilities.
